calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2022 Set For Trial On May-08-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Continued To Sep-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ADRIAN SLIPSKI, Esq. of Center for Disability Access (Tel: 858-375-7385) for plaintiff;
Atty. PHILIP H. STILLMAN, Esq. of Stillman & Associates (Tel: 888-235-4279) for defendant Ruksakul Tanatanyanon.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RUKSAKUL TANATANYANON'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order overruling defendant's demurrer. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/RBU) *****

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Continued To Jul-27-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RUKSAKUL TANATANYANON's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT

The defendant's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" and file a declaration stating "[t]he means by which the demurring party met and conferred." The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the amended complaint is now due by May 26, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
